properties.name: mini-local-message.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable the local message table starter.

properties.name: mini-local-message.table-name
properties.description: Database table used to store pending reliable method invocations.

properties.name: mini-local-message.retry-cron
properties.description: Cron expression for scanning records that are ready to retry.

properties.name: mini-local-message.retry-fetch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of retry records fetched in one scheduler tick.

properties.name: mini-local-message.retry-delay-seconds
properties.description: Initial retry delay in seconds after an execution failure.

properties.name: mini-local-message.retry-multiplier
properties.description: Backoff multiplier used to calculate the next retry delay.
